full_text:
Chen Rong 陳容
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Rong (陳容)was born in Guanling. Embarrassed Yuan Shao by rebuking him over Zang Hong’s revolt and was executed. Chen Rong was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Chen Rong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
